AN ESTIMATED F0 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN IN THE NATIONAL FOREST NEAR OSWALD DOME ROAD, LAT. 35.11434 DEGREES NORTH, LONG. 84.61314 DEGREES WEST. THE TORNADO PATH WAS APPROXIMATELY 25 YARDS WIDE AND 2.1 MILES LONG ENDING NEAR HIGHWAY 30, LAT. 35.11577 DEGREES NORTH, 84.58115 DEGREES WEST. THE ONLY DAMAGE WAS TO TREES WITHIN THE NATIONAL FOREST.
